current_report.title: Iran Update Special Report, March 27, 2026
current_report.title_zh: 伊朗 Update Special Report, March 27, 2026

takeaways.en: Iran may be attempting to maximize the effects of its limited capacity to launch large missile salvos at Israel by launching small missile salvos throughout the day to impose psychological effects on Israeli civilians by consistently forcing them to take shelter and keeping the country under constant alert. Iran is spreading out its launches throughout the day, often pausing for several hours between launches. Spreading out ballistic missile launches over a long period of time presumably increases the number of times per day that Israeli civilians must seek shelter.
takeaways.zh: 伊朗可能试图通过全天发射小型导弹炮弹来最大限度地发挥其向以色列发射大型导弹炮弹的有限能力的影响，通过不断迫使以色列平民躲避并使该国处于持续警戒状态来对以色列平民施加心理影响。伊朗正在全天进行发射，通常会在两次发射之间暂停几个小时。 在很长一段时间内发射弹道导弹可能会增加以色列平民每天必须寻求庇护的次数。

takeaways.en: Such a strategy is suboptimal and likely reflects the US-Israeli combined force’s degradation of Iran’s ability to launch large-scale missile attacks. The combined force’s degradation of Iran’s missile capabilities has prevented Iran from consistently launching large-scale missile attacks against Israel during the current conflict, however.
takeaways.zh: 这种策略并不理想，可能反映了美以联合部队削弱了伊朗发动大规模导弹袭击的能力。然而，联合部队降低了伊朗的导弹能力，阻止了伊朗在当前冲突期间不断向以色列发动大规模导弹袭击。

takeaways.en: Iran has increasingly used cluster munitions in its attacks on Israel during the war, which likely reflects Iran’s inability to meaningfully threaten discrete military targets in Israel and efforts to inflict psychological effects on Israeli civilians.
takeaways.zh: 伊朗在战争期间越来越多地使用集束弹药袭击以色列，这可能反映了伊朗无法有意义地威胁以色列的离散军事目标，以及对以色列平民造成心理影响的努力。

takeaways.en: Ukraine and Saudi Arabia concluded a defense cooperation agreement on March 27. The Ukrainian Presidential Office reported that Ukraine will help Saudi Arabia with air defenses under the agreement, which also outlines the foundations for further contacts and includes technological cooperation and investments.
takeaways.zh: 乌克兰和沙特阿拉伯于3月27日签署了防务合作协议。乌克兰总统办公室报告说，乌克兰将根据协议帮助沙特阿拉伯进行防空，该协议还概述了进一步接触的基础，包括技术合作和投资。

takeaways.en: The combined force has continued to disrupt Iran’s ability to launch missile attacks, including by disrupting Iranian efforts to regain access to missile launchers in underground bases. US Central Command (CENTCOM) published footage on March 27 showing that it struck bulldozers and loaders that Iran was likely using to try to clear debris and reopen tunnel entrances to underground facilities.
takeaways.zh: 这支联合部队继续破坏伊朗发动导弹袭击的能力，包括破坏伊朗重新获得地下基地导弹发射器的努力。美国中央司令部（ 中央司令部 ）于3月27日发布的镜头显示，它击中了推土机和装载机，伊朗可能用这些推土机和装载机试图清理碎片并重新打开地下设施的隧道入口。

takeaways.en: The IDF struck Iranian nuclear infrastructure on March 27, including sites involved in plutonium production and the uranium fuel cycle. The IDF struck the Arak Heavy Water Production Facility in Arak, Markazi Province, following repeated Iranian attempts to restore the site following IDF strikes on the site during the June 2025 Israel-Iran War. The IDF also struck the Ardakan Yellowcake Production Plant in Yazd Province.
takeaways.zh: 以色列国防军于3月27日袭击了伊朗的核基础设施，包括涉及钚生产和铀燃料循环的场地。以色列国防军袭击了马尔卡齐省阿拉克的阿拉克重水生产设施，此前伊朗在2025年6月以色列-伊朗战争期间多次尝试恢复该地点。以色列国防军还袭击了亚兹德省的Ardakan黄饼生产厂。
